label: Relative position, RoPE, ALiBi & coordinate mechanisms

node.label: Relative position, RoPE, ALiBi & coordinate mechanisms
node.definition: Order or geometric relationships are injected into attention and sequence models.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Relative position, RoPE, ALiBi & coordinate mechanisms is modeled as depending on Positional, temporal & coordinate encodings, Self-attention and feeding downstream nodes such as Transformers, Graph transformers.
examples: atlas downstream link to Graph transformers
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Positional, temporal & coordinate encodings, Self-attention.
